meaning: adj.巨大的,畸形的,怪异的,恐怖的,凶暴的adj.<口>难以置信的,荒谬的
examples: His monstrous pearl was extremely valuable.
She endured the monstrous behaviour for years.
A group of men are erecting a monstrous copper edifice.
Oil sands require monstrous amounts of water and natural gas to recover and process.
The New York Times covers a particularly noxious example of a monstrous hybrid: for-profit probation.
